name: geo-countries
title: Country Polygons as GeoJSON
description: geodata data package providing geojson polygons for all the world's countries

licenses.name: ODC-PDDL-1.0
licenses.title: Open Data Commons Public Domain Dedication and License v1.0

resources.name: countries
resources.description: GeoJSON FeatureCollection of 258 country (and territory) polygons. Features without an assigned ISO code carry the sentinel value "-99" for both ISO fields.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Common name of the country or territory

fields.name: ISO3166-1-Alpha-2
fields.description: 2-letter ISO 3166-1 country code. Set to "-99" for features that have no assigned ISO code (e.g. disputed or unrecognised territories).

fields.name: ISO3166-1-Alpha-3
fields.description: 3-letter ISO 3166-1 country code. Set to "-99" for features that have no assigned ISO code (e.g. disputed or unrecognised territories).
